name: Nucleus CSS
description: A polished, accessible, zero-build CSS framework.

components.name: n-container
components.title: Container
components.description: Centered, max-width page container with responsive breakpoints.
components.notes: Use n-container-fluid for a full-width container with gutters but no max-width.

components.name: n-row
components.title: Grid row
components.description: 12-column CSS grid row. Pair with n-col-* children.
components.notes: Column classes exist for spans 1–12 at base, sm, md, lg, and xl breakpoints (e.g. n-col-md-6).

components.name: n-auto-grid
components.title: Auto grid
components.description: Responsive grid that fits as many columns as space allows.
components.notes: Set the minimum column width with the --n-grid-min custom property.
components.example:
One
Two
Three

components.name: n-sidebar-layout
components.title: Sidebar layout
components.description: Two-column layout that collapses to a single column on narrow screens.
components.notes: Add n-sidebar-right to place the sidebar after the main content.

components.name: n-cluster
components.title: Cluster
components.description: Flex row of items that wrap, with consistent gaps.

components.name: n-split
components.title: Split
components.description: Pushes two groups to opposite ends of a row.

components.name: n-stack
components.title: Stack
components.description: Vertical grid stack with a consistent gap between children.

components.name: n-btn
components.title: Button
components.description: Base button. Combine with a color variant and optional size.
components.accessibility: Use a native <button> for actions and an <a class="n-btn"> only for navigation. Disable with the [disabled] attribute (or n-disabled for anchors, which cannot be natively disabled).
components.example:
<button class="n-btn n-btn-primary">Continue</button>
<button class="n-btn n-btn-outline-primary">Learn more</button>
<button class="n-btn n-btn-primary" disabled>Disabled</button>

components.name: n-button-group
components.title: Button group
components.description: Joins adjacent buttons into a single segmented control.

components.name: n-card
components.title: Card
components.description: Surface container with optional header, body, and footer regions.
components.notes: Add n-card-interactive for a hover lift, or n-card-elevated for a stronger shadow.
components.example:
Plan

Everything you need to start.

components.name: n-input
components.title: Text input
components.description: Full-width text field. Pair with n-label inside an n-form-group.
components.accessibility: Every control needs an associated <label>. Signal invalid state with aria-invalid="true" (styled automatically) and describe the error with n-error-text via aria-describedby.
components.example: We never share your email.

components.name: n-select
components.title: Select
components.description: Styled native select with a custom chevron.

components.name: n-textarea
components.title: Textarea
components.description: Vertically resizable multi-line text field.

components.name: n-checkbox
components.title: Checkbox / radio
components.description: Inline label wrapper for a native checkbox or radio.
components.example:
<label class="n-checkbox">
  <input type="checkbox"> Subscribe to updates
</label>
<label class="n-radio">
  <input type="radio" name="tier"> Free
</label>

components.name: n-switch
components.title: Switch
components.description: Accessible toggle built from a visually-hidden checkbox and a track.
components.accessibility: The <input type="checkbox"> carries the accessible state; keep it inside the label.

components.name: n-input-group
components.title: Input group
components.description: Joins an input with prefix/suffix add-ons or a button.
components.example: https://

components.name: n-fieldset
components.title: Fieldset
components.description: Grouped form controls with a legend.
components.example: Address

components.name: n-navbar
components.title: Navbar
components.description: Sticky top navigation bar with brand and nav links.
components.accessibility: Mark the active link with the `active` class and aria-current="page".
components.example:
Nucleus
  • Home
  • Docs

components.name: n-breadcrumb
components.title: Breadcrumb
components.description: Ordered trail of ancestor links.

components.name: n-pagination
components.title: Pagination
components.description: List of page links; mark the current page with aria-current.
components.example:
• 1
  • 2
  • 3

components.name: n-tabs
components.title: Tabs
components.description: Horizontal tablist. Toggle aria-selected in JavaScript.
components.accessibility: Requires JS to move aria-selected and manage focus per the WAI-ARIA tabs pattern.
components.example: …

components.name: n-alert
components.title: Alert
components.description: Colored message banner for contextual feedback.
components.accessibility: Add role="alert" for errors and role="status" for non-urgent messages.
components.example: Your changes have been saved.

components.name: n-badge
components.title: Badge
components.description: Small pill for counts, labels, or status.

components.name: n-callout
components.title: Callout
components.description: Boxed aside for tips and warnings.
components.example:
Heads up

Container queries need a modern browser.

components.name: n-toast
components.title: Toast
components.description: Transient notification; stack with n-toast-stack.
components.example: Saved to your library.

components.name: n-progress
components.title: Progress bar
components.description: Native <progress> element styling.

components.name: n-spinner
components.title: Spinner
components.description: Indeterminate loading indicator.
components.accessibility: Respects prefers-reduced-motion. Provide an aria-label since it has no text.

components.name: n-skeleton
components.title: Skeleton
components.description: Shimmering placeholder for loading content.

components.name: n-dialog
components.title: Dialog
components.description: Native <dialog> modal. Open with dialog.showModal() in JavaScript.
components.accessibility: Open with element.showModal() (not the open attribute) so focus trapping, Esc-to-close, and the backdrop work. A method="dialog" form closes it.
components.example:
Confirm
Delete this item?

components.name: n-drawer
components.title: Drawer
components.description: Edge-anchored <dialog> panel.
components.notes: Combine with n-dialog; add n-drawer-left to anchor on the left edge.

components.name: n-accordion
components.title: Accordion
components.description: Disclosure group built on native <details>/<summary>.
components.accessibility: Native <details> handles keyboard and expanded state with no JavaScript.
components.example:
What is Nucleus?
A zero-build CSS framework.

components.name: n-dropdown
components.title: Dropdown menu
components.description: Menu surface of n-dropdown-item rows. Best inside a popover.

components.name: n-tooltip
components.title: Tooltip
components.description: CSS-only tooltip driven by the data-tooltip attribute.
components.accessibility: For essential text also expose it to assistive tech (e.g. aria-label).

components.name: n-table
components.title: Table
components.description: Base table styling with striped/hover/bordered variants.

components.name: n-list-group
components.title: List group
components.description: Bordered vertical list of rows.

components.name: n-stat
components.title: Stat
components.description: Labeled metric with a large value and optional change indicator.

components.name: n-avatar
components.title: Avatar
components.description: Circular image or initials.

components.name: n-chip
components.title: Chip
components.description: Compact token, optionally removable.

components.name: n-empty-state
components.title: Empty state
components.description: Centered placeholder for empty views.
components.example:
📭

No messages

You're all caught up.

components.name: n-prose
components.title: Prose
components.description: Readable typographic defaults for long-form article HTML.
components.example:
Getting started

Nucleus styles your semantic HTML automatically inside a prose block.

  • One
  • Two

components.name: n-code-block
components.title: Code block
components.description: Dark, scrollable preformatted code panel.
components.example:
npm install @navital/nucleus-css

Press ⌘ K to search.

components.name: n-blockquote
components.title: Blockquote
components.description: Quotation with an accent border.

components.name: n-surface
components.title: Surface
components.description: Elevated panel with border, radius, and soft shadow.

classes.name: n-accordion
classes.css: border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius-lg); background: var(--n-surface); overflow: clip;

classes.name: n-alert
classes.description: Colored message banner for contextual feedback.
classes.css: padding: 0.875rem 1rem; border-radius: var(--n-radius); border-left: 4px solid transparent; font-size: var(--n-text-sm); line-height: 1.5; box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-sm);

classes.name: n-auto-grid
classes.description: Applies display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, var(--n-grid-min, 16rem)), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-grid-gap, var(--n-gutter)).
classes.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, var(--n-grid-min, 16rem)), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-grid-gap, var(--n-gutter));

classes.name: n-avatar
classes.description: Applies display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; border-radius: var(--n-radius-full); background: var(--n-primary); color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--n-text-sm); overflow: hidden.

classes.name: n-badge
classes.description: Small pill for counts, labels, or status.
classes.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: var(--n-text-xs); font-weight: 600; border-radius: var(--n-radius-full); line-height: 1.5;

classes.name: n-blockquote
classes.description: Applies padding-inline-start: 1.25rem; border-inline-start: 4px solid var(--n-primary); color: var(--n-text-muted); font-size: var(--n-text-lg); font-style: italic.
classes.css: padding-inline-start: 1.25rem; border-inline-start: 4px solid var(--n-primary); color: var(--n-text-muted); font-size: var(--n-text-lg); font-style: italic;

classes.name: n-breadcrumb
classes.css: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; color: var(--n-text-muted); font-size: var(--n-text-sm); list-style: none;

classes.name: n-btn
classes.description: Base button. Combine with a color variant and optional size.

classes.name: n-btn-outline-danger
classes.css: background: transparent; color: var(--n-danger); border-color: var(--n-danger);

classes.name: n-btn-outline-primary
classes.css: background: transparent; color: var(--n-primary); border-color: var(--n-primary);

classes.name: n-btn-outline-secondary
classes.css: background: transparent; color: var(--n-secondary); border-color: var(--n-secondary);

classes.name: n-btn-outline-success
classes.css: background: transparent; color: var(--n-success); border-color: var(--n-success);

classes.name: n-callout
classes.description: Boxed aside for tips and warnings.
classes.css: padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius-lg); background: var(--n-bg-muted);

classes.name: n-caption
classes.description: Applies font-size: var(--n-text-xs); line-height: 1.5; color: var(--n-text-muted).

classes.name: n-card
classes.description: Surface container with optional header, body, and footer regions.

classes.name: n-character-count
classes.description: Applies margin-block-start: 0.25rem; color: var(--n-text-muted); font-size: var(--n-text-xs); text-align: end.
classes.css: margin-block-start: 0.25rem; color: var(--n-text-muted); font-size: var(--n-text-xs); text-align: end;

classes.name: n-checkbox
classes.description: Inline label wrapper for a native checkbox or radio.
classes.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; font-size: var(--n-text-sm);

classes.name: n-chip-remove
classes.css: display: inline-grid; width: 1.375rem; height: 1.375rem; place-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; color: var(--n-text-muted); cursor: pointer;

classes.name: n-cluster
classes.description: Applies display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: var(--n-cluster-gap, var(--n-space-2)).
classes.css: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: var(--n-cluster-gap, var(--n-space-2));

classes.name: n-container
classes.description: Applies width: 100%; margin-inline: auto; padding-inline: var(--n-gutter).

classes.name: n-container-fluid
classes.description: Applies width: 100%; margin-inline: auto; padding-inline: var(--n-gutter); max-width: none.
classes.css: width: 100%; margin-inline: auto; padding-inline: var(--n-gutter); max-width: none;

classes.name: n-cover
classes.description: Applies display: flex; min-height: var(--n-cover-height, 100dvh); flex-direction: column; padding: var(--n-space-3).
classes.css: display: flex; min-height: var(--n-cover-height, 100dvh); flex-direction: column; padding: var(--n-space-3);

classes.name: n-cq-row
classes.description: Applies display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--n-space-3).
classes.css: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--n-space-3);

classes.name: n-dialog
classes.description: Native <dialog> modal. Open with dialog.showModal() in JavaScript.

classes.name: n-divider
classes.description: Applies border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); margin: 1.5rem 0.
classes.css: border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); margin: 1.5rem 0;

classes.name: n-divider-gradient
classes.description: Applies height: 1px; border: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--n-border-color), transparent).
classes.css: height: 1px; border: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--n-border-color), transparent);

classes.name: n-dragging
classes.description: Applies opacity: 0.72; box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-lg); transform: rotate(1deg); cursor: grabbing.
classes.css: opacity: 0.72; box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-lg); transform: rotate(1deg); cursor: grabbing;

classes.name: n-drawer
classes.css: width: min(90vw, var(--n-drawer-width, 26rem)); height: 100dvh; max-height: none; margin: 0 0 0 auto; border: 0; border-inline-start: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: 0;

classes.name: n-dropdown
classes.description: Menu surface of n-dropdown-item rows. Best inside a popover.

classes.name: n-empty-state
classes.css: display: grid; max-width: 32rem; place-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; margin-inline: auto; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; text-align: center;

classes.name: n-empty-state-icon
classes.css: display: grid; width: 3.5rem; height: 3.5rem; place-items: center; border-radius: var(--n-radius-full); background: var(--n-bg-muted); font-size: 1.5rem;

classes.name: n-fieldset
classes.description: Grouped form controls with a legend.
classes.css: min-width: 0; padding: var(--n-space-3); border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius-lg);

classes.name: n-file-input
classes.description: Applies width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius); background: var(--n-bg); color: var(--n-text-muted).
classes.css: width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius); background: var(--n-bg); color: var(--n-text-muted);

classes.name: n-form-grid
classes.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 15rem), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-component-gap);

classes.name: n-gradient-border
classes.description: Applies position: relative; border: 1px solid transparent; background: linear-gradient(var(--n-bg), var(--n-bg)) padding-box, linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,102,241,.8), rgba(14,165,233,.55)) border-box.
classes.css: position: relative; border: 1px solid transparent; background: linear-gradient(var(--n-bg), var(--n-bg)) padding-box, linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,102,241,.8), rgba(14,165,233,.55)) border-box;

classes.name: n-gradient-mesh
classes.description: Applies background-color: var(--n-bg); background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 10% 15%, rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.18), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 90% 10%, rgba(14, 116, 144, 0.14), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 70% 90%, rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.12), transparent 32%).

classes.name: n-gradient-primary
classes.description: Applies background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--n-primary), var(--n-secondary)); color: #fff.

classes.name: n-gradient-text
classes.description: Applies background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--n-primary), var(--n-secondary)); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent.
classes.css: background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--n-primary), var(--n-secondary)); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent;

classes.name: n-grid-auto-fill
classes.description: Applies display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, var(--n-grid-min, 14rem)), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-grid-gap, var(--n-gutter)).
classes.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, var(--n-grid-min, 14rem)), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-grid-gap, var(--n-gutter));

classes.name: n-grid-auto-fit
classes.description: Applies display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, var(--n-grid-min, 14rem)), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-grid-gap, var(--n-gutter)).
classes.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, var(--n-grid-min, 14rem)), 1fr)); gap: var(--n-grid-gap, var(--n-gutter));

classes.name: n-hover-lift
classes.description: Sets transition: transform var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease), box-shadow var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease).
classes.css: transition: transform var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease), box-shadow var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease);

classes.name: n-input
classes.description: Full-width text field. Pair with n-label inside an n-form-group.

classes.name: n-input-group
classes.description: Joins an input with prefix/suffix add-ons or a button.

classes.name: n-input-suffix
classes.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding-inline: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); background: var(--n-bg-muted); color: var(--n-text-muted); white-space: nowrap;

classes.name: n-label
classes.css: display: block; margin-bottom: 0.375rem; font-size: var(--n-text-sm); font-weight: 500; color: var(--n-text);

classes.name: n-lead
classes.description: Applies font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 1rem + 0.5vw, 1.375rem); line-height: 1.65; color: var(--n-text-muted).

classes.name: n-list-group
classes.css: border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius-lg); background: var(--n-surface); list-style: none; overflow: hidden;

classes.name: n-list-group-item
classes.css: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem;

classes.name: n-list-inline
classes.description: Applies list-style: none; padding-left: 0; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem.
classes.css: list-style: none; padding-left: 0; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem;

classes.name: n-nav
classes.css: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; list-style: none; min-width: 0;

classes.name: n-navbar
classes.description: Sticky top navigation bar with brand and nav links.

classes.name: n-navbar-brand
classes.css: font-size: var(--n-text-xl); font-weight: 700; color: var(--n-text); text-decoration: none;

classes.name: n-noise
classes.description: Sets background-image: repeating-radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.035) 0 1px, transparent 1px 4px).

classes.name: n-overline
classes.description: Applies font-size: var(--n-text-xs); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--n-primary).
classes.css: font-size: var(--n-text-xs); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--n-primary);

classes.name: n-page-atmosphere
classes.description: Applies background-color: var(--n-bg); background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.08), transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(14, 116, 144, 0.06), transparent 28%); background-attachment: fixed.

classes.name: n-pagination
classes.description: List of page links; mark the current page with aria-current.
classes.css: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; list-style: none;

classes.name: n-progress
classes.css: width: 100%; height: 0.625rem; border: 0; border-radius: var(--n-radius-full); background: var(--n-bg-muted); overflow: hidden;

classes.name: n-radio
classes.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; font-size: var(--n-text-sm);

classes.name: n-reel
classes.description: Applies display: flex; gap: var(--n-reel-gap, var(--n-gutter)); overflow-x: auto; overscroll-behavior-inline: contain; scroll-snap-type: inline mandatory; padding-block-end: var(--n-space-2).
classes.css: display: flex; gap: var(--n-reel-gap, var(--n-gutter)); overflow-x: auto; overscroll-behavior-inline: contain; scroll-snap-type: inline mandatory; padding-block-end: var(--n-space-2);

classes.name: n-row
classes.description: Applies display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: var(--n-gutter).
classes.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: var(--n-gutter);

classes.name: n-select
classes.description: Styled native select with a custom chevron.

classes.name: n-sidebar-layout
classes.description: Applies display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); gap: var(--n-sidebar-gap, var(--n-space-4)).
classes.css: display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); gap: var(--n-sidebar-gap, var(--n-space-4));

classes.name: n-skip-link
classes.description: Applies position: fixed; z-index: 9999; inset-block-start: 0.75rem; inset-inline-start: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; border-radius: var(--n-radius); background: var(--n-primary); color: var(--n-on-primary); box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-lg); transform: translateY(-200%).

classes.name: n-spinner
classes.css: display: inline-block; width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; border: 2px solid currentColor; border-right-color: transparent; border-radius: 50%; animation: n-spin 0.7s linear infinite;

classes.name: n-split
classes.description: Applies display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: var(--n-space-3).
classes.css: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: var(--n-space-3);

classes.name: n-sr-only
classes.description: Applies position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0.
classes.css: position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0;

classes.name: n-stack
classes.description: Vertical grid stack with a consistent gap between children.

classes.name: n-stat
classes.description: Labeled metric with a large value and optional change indicator.

classes.name: n-surface
classes.description: Elevated panel with border, radius, and soft shadow.
classes.css: background: var(--n-bg); border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); border-radius: var(--n-radius-xl); box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-soft);

classes.name: n-surface-glass
classes.css: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-glow);

classes.name: n-surface-overlay
classes.css: background: var(--n-surface-raised); border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-xl);

classes.name: n-surface-raised
classes.css: background: var(--n-surface-raised); border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); box-shadow: var(--n-shadow-md);

classes.name: n-surface-sunken
classes.css: background: var(--n-surface-sunken); border: 1px solid var(--n-border-color); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);

classes.name: n-switch
classes.description: Accessible toggle built from a visually-hidden checkbox and a track.
classes.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; user-select: none;

classes.name: n-switcher
classes.description: Applies display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--n-switcher-gap, var(--n-gutter)).
classes.css: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--n-switcher-gap, var(--n-gutter));

classes.name: n-tab
classes.css: position: relative; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--n-text-muted); font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer;

classes.name: n-table
classes.description: Base table styling with striped/hover/bordered variants.

classes.name: n-tabs
classes.description: Horizontal tablist. Toggle aria-selected in JavaScript.
classes.css: display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; overflow-x: auto; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--n-border-color);

classes.name: n-toast-stack
classes.css: position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset-inline-end: 1rem; inset-block-end: 1rem; display: grid; gap: 0.75rem;

classes.name: n-tooltip
classes.description: CSS-only tooltip driven by the data-tooltip attribute.

classes.name: n-transition-colors
classes.description: Sets transition: color var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease), background-color var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease), border-color var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease).
classes.css: transition: color var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease), background-color var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease), border-color var(--n-duration) var(--n-ease);

classes.name: n-truncate
classes.description: Applies overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap.
classes.css: overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
